hero.tagline: The Indian Dream, Built To Drive.

overview.minides: Skoda's most affordable and best-selling SUV — a sub-4m turbo-petrol compact with 5-star Bharat NCAP, 446L boot, ventilated powered front seats, sunroof, and the best driving dynamics in its segment.
overview.description: Launched in November 2024 as Skoda India's entry into the sub-compact SUV space, the Kylaq is built on the same MQB A0 IN platform as the Kushaq and Slavia at the Chakan plant in Pune. Powered exclusively by the 1.0-litre TSI turbo petrol producing 115 PS and 178 Nm, it is offered with a 6-speed manual or 6-speed torque converter automatic across 11 variants. The Kylaq is the first Skoda in India to place headlamps below the LED DRLs, features a distinctive T-shaped rear LED cluster, and carries a 5-star Bharat NCAP rating. Top Prestige+ variants add powered and ventilated front seats, a single-pane sunroof, wireless Android Auto and Apple CarPlay, an 8-inch digital cluster, a 10-inch touchscreen, and front parking sensors. No ADAS, 360-degree camera, panoramic sunroof, rear disc brakes, or dual-zone climate control is offered on any variant — keeping costs low while prioritising driving dynamics and build quality.

dimensions.bootSpace: 446 Litres (1265 L with rear seats folded)

sharedSpecs.platform: MQB A0 IN (Modular Transverse Matrix, India-Specific, Sub-4m)
